advocacyHeadline: 🚲🌳✨ Placeholder: Let your representatives know how you feel — safer complete streets, walkable neighborhoods, and car-free ways of living build healthier, happier communities. You’ve got this!

statements.title: Placeholder: Please Keep Our Streets Safe
statements.body:
We need to preserve safety features. Please do that.

Thank you.

statements.title: Placeholder: We Need Safe Routes to School
statements.body:
Children need safe routes to school. When our streets only consider cars, they are not safe and do not support childhood independence.

Thank you.
